# Porous Media

**Summary**: A material containing pores, such as the sedimentary formations in the study area.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026]] investigated clogging of porous media by polydisperse particles.

## Scientific Context

- [[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026]] The physical properties of the porous media determine the hydraulic conductivity and clogging behavior.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026]] Characterized through mineralogy and petrography.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Dammam Formation, consisting primarily of limestone, is the main water-bearing unit. ([[2026-fatima|Fatima, 2026, p. 22]])
